01-pipeline-thinking.instruction: Map your content creation as a pipeline: inputs, transformations, quality gates, outputs. Where are bottlenecks?

02-content-architecture.instruction: Design content architecture: types (blog, social, email, video), relationships, and taxonomy.

03-template-engines.instruction: Create a reusable prompt template for blog posts. Variables (topic, audience, tone, length), structure, quality criteria.
03-template-engines.successMessage: Prompt templates are the factory machines.

04-multi-format-output.instruction: One core idea, 5 formats: tweet thread, LinkedIn post, blog intro, email subject, video script hook.
04-multi-format-output.successMessage: One idea, five formats. 5x output from single input.

05-quality-control-systems.instruction: Design QC checklist for AI content: factual accuracy, brand voice, readability, SEO, originality. How to automate each?
05-quality-control-systems.successMessage: Quality control separates AI slop from AI-powered excellence.

06-personalization-at-scale.instruction: Personalize the same content for 3 audience segments. Show how core message stays same but framing changes.
06-personalization-at-scale.successMessage: Same message, different frames. Enterprise-level personalization.

07-multimedia-pipelines.instruction: Pipeline: blog post -> social graphics, audiogram, video script, infographic brief. Map data flow between steps.

08-scheduling-and-distribution.instruction: Design automated distribution: platforms, optimal posting times, A/B testing, platform-specific formatting.

09-analytics-driven-content.instruction: Design feedback loop: performance data improving future content. Metrics, feed-back mechanism, decision rules.
09-analytics-driven-content.successMessage: Analytics-driven creation is the ultimate advantage.

10-your-content-machine.instruction: Complete content pipeline end-to-end: inputs, AI stages, quality gates, output formats, distribution, analytics feedback.
